transcript: Speaker A: reels ನೋಡ್ತಾ time waste ಮಾಡ್ತಿದ್ದೀರಾ? ನಿಮಗೊಂದು secret tip ಹೇಳ್ತೀನಿ ಕೇಳಿ. ನಿಮ್ಮ life set ಆಗುತ್ತೆ, interview clear ಆಗುತ್ತೆ, job ಅಲ್ಲಿ promotion ಸಿಗುತ್ತೆ, ನಿಮ್ಮ business ಅಲ್ಲಿ ಒಳ್ಳೆ ದುಡ್ಡು ಮಾಡ್ತೀರಾ. ಇದೆಲ್ಲಾ ಬೇಕು ಅಂದ್ರೆ english ತುಂಬಾ ಇಂಪಾರ್ಟೆಂಟ್. english ಸಕ್ಕತ್ತಾಗಿ ಮಾತಾಡೋದು ತುಂಬಾ easy... ಜಸ್ಟ್ MySivi ಆಪ್ ಇನ್ಸ್ಟಾಲ್ ಮಾಡ್ಕೊಳ್ಳಿ. ಅಲ್ಲಿ AI ಟೀಚರ್ ಇರುತ್ತೆ, ಅದು ನಿಮ್ಮ ಕನ್ನಡದಿಂದಲೇ english ಕಲಿಸುತ್ತೆ. ಡೈಲಿ ಜಸ್ಟ್ 15 ಮಿನಿಟ್ಸ್ ಸಾಕು, ಒಂದು ತಿಂಗಳಲ್ಲಿ ನೀವೇ ಶಾಕ್ ಆಗ್ತೀರಾ. ಇದೆಲ್ಲಾ ಬರೀ ಒಂದು ರೂಪಾಯಿಗೆ ಮಾತ್ರ. ಇವಾಗ್ಲೇ MySivi ಆಪ್ ಇನ್ಸ್ಟಾಲ್ ಮಾಡಿ, ಲೇಟ್ ಮಾಡ್ಬೇಡಿ. [Are you wasting time watching reels? Let me tell you a secret tip, listen. Your life will be set, interviews will be cleared, you'll get a promotion in your job, you'll make good money in your business. If you want all this, English is very important. Speaking English fluently is very easy... just install the MySivi app. There is an AI teacher there, it will teach you English from Kannada itself. Just 15 minutes daily is enough, in one month you yourself will be shocked. All this for just one rupee. Install the MySivi app right now, don't delay.] Speaker B: Click on install now and download MySivi app.
on_screen_text: "reels ನೋಡ್ತಾ time waste ಮಾಡ್ತಿದ್ದೀರಾ?" [Are you wasting time watching reels?], "ನಿಮಗೊಂದು secret tip ಹೇಳ್ತೀನಿ ಕೇಳಿ" [Let me tell you a secret tip, listen], "ನಿಮ್ಮ life set ಆಗುತ್ತೆ" [Your life will be set], "interview clear ಆಗುತ್ತೆ" [Interview will be cleared], "job ಅಲ್ಲಿ promotion ಸಿಗುತ್ತೆ" [You will get a promotion in your job], "ನಿಮ್ಮ business ಅಲ್ಲಿ ಒಳ್ಳೆ ದುಡ್ಡು ಮಾಡ್ತೀರಾ" [You will make good money in your business], "ಇದೆಲ್ಲಾ ಬೇಕು ಅಂದ್ರೆ english ತುಂಬಾ ಇಂಪಾರ್ಟೆಂಟ್" [If you want all this, English is very important], "english ಸಕ್ಕತ್ತಾಗಿ ಮಾತಾಡೋದು ತುಂಬಾ easy... just app install ಮಾಡ್ಕೊಳ್ಳಿ" [Speaking English fluently is very easy... just install the app], "MySivi", "ಅಲ್ಲಿ ai teacher ಇರುತ್ತೆ ಅದು ನಿಮ್ಮ ಕನ್ನಡದಿಂದಲೇ english ಕಲಿಸುತ್ತೆ" [There is an AI teacher there, it will teach you English from Kannada itself], "daily just ಸಾಕು..." [daily just enough...], "15 MINUTES", "1 month", "ನೀವೇ shock ಆಗೋ..." [you yourself will be shocked...], "ಇದೆಲ್ಲ ಬರೀ ಮಾತ್ರ 1 RUPEE" [All this for just 1 Rupee], "ಇವಾಗಲೇ app install ಮಾಡಿ... late ಮಾಡ್ಬೇಡಿ..." [Install the app right now... don't delay...], "MySivi English speaking app Install Now"
summary: The presenter hooks the audience by asking if they are wasting time on reels, then offers a solution to boost their career and business by learning English. She introduces the MySivi app, which features an AI teacher that teaches English through Kannada for just 1 Rupee. The ad ends with a call to action to download the app immediately.
